Road No. 45, Jubilee Hills, Hyderabad

Book Table
CULINARY EXHIBITION

Explore Our Menu

Handcrafted creations inspired by European culinary traditions, prepared with meticulous craft.

Maison Élan Classics

Signature Pastries & Viennoiserie

Flaky laminated doughs, twice-baked golden bakes, and delicate cream fillings prepared daily at dawn by our pastry chefs.

Eggless Available Signature
₹320

Almond Croissant

Twice-baked flaky butter croissant filled with rich almond frangipane, topped with toasted sliced almonds and vanilla glaze.

Eggless Available House Specialty
₹340

Chocolate Croissant

Flaky laminated butter pastry rolled around premium 70% dark Belgian chocolate batons, baked to a deep golden crisp.

Eggless Chef Recommended
₹450

Pistachio Rose Tart

Delicate crisp pastry base lined with sweet pistachio ganache, layered with organic rosewater cream, finished with premium crushed pistachios.

French Craft
₹360

French Éclair

Classic crisp choux pastry pipe filled with velvety Madagascar vanilla bean pastry cream, finished with a glossy dark chocolate mirror glaze.

Eggless Available Signature
₹520

Belgian Chocolate Cake

Decadent multi-layered sponge cake frosted with premium 64% Callebaut chocolate fudge ganache and cocoa dust flakes.

Contains Coffee Chef Selection
₹480

Classic Tiramisu

Italian ladyfingers soaked in single-origin espresso and dark rum, layered with whipped mascarpone cream and premium cocoa powder.

Eggless
₹490

Vanilla Cheesecake

New York style slow-baked cheesecake on a buttered graham cracker crust, topped with fresh raspberry compote and mint sprig.

Premium Platter
₹950

Signature Dessert Collection

An elegant tasting platter featuring mini versions of our tarts, mousses, and artisan macarons, perfect for pairing with coffee.

House Blend
₹360

Signature Hot Chocolate

Pure melted 70% dark Belgian chocolate mixed with fresh organic milk, served with a house-made gourmet marshmallow.

Single Origin
₹260

Artisan Coffee

Hand-poured filter coffee using single-origin Arabica beans, roasted locally in Jubilee Hills, highlighting floral and chocolate notes.

Fresh Espresso
₹240

Cappuccino

Double shot of house blend espresso topped with a smooth, velvety layer of aerated steamed milk and micro-foam art.

Bartender Selection
₹320

Premium Mocktails

A refreshing cold-pressed mocktail blending fresh pomegranate juice, mint sprigs, lime, and organic lavender syrup, topped with fizz.

Vegetarian House Bread
₹480

Gourmet Sandwiches

Toasted house sourdough bread layered with fresh buffalo mozzarella, sliced organic heirloom tomatoes, basil pesto, and microgreens.

Chef Special
₹650

Artisan Pasta

Handcrafted fresh fettuccine tossed in a rich emulsion of Pecorino Romano cheese, black pepper, and shaved winter black truffles.

Vegetarian
₹580

European-inspired Pizza

Stone-baked thin crust pizza topped with cream cheese base, wild portobello mushrooms, drizzled with truffle oil and fresh arugula.

Signature Savory
₹720

Chef Specials

Slow pan-seared cottage cheese medallion glazed with herb butter, served with grilled asparagus, and velvet truffle potato puree.

Join Us In Hyderabad

Experience the Art of Slow Dining

Join us in Hyderabad and let our culinary team create a memorable dining experience crafted around flavors, ambience, and moments.

Reserve Your Table Explore Location

Maison Élan

An elegant European dining experience and slow-living salon in Jubilee Hills, Hyderabad.
